briefdescription.para: This function handles Reduced Block Command (RBC) requests from the host.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to XUsbPs instance of the controller.
is the number of the endpoint on which the RBC was received.
is the data buffer containing the RBC or data.
is the length of the data buffer.

briefdescription.para: This function is called by Chapter9 handler when class request is received from Host.

detaileddescription.para:
InstancePtr
is pointer to Usb_DevData instance.
SetupData
is the setup packet received from Host.
None. This function is called by Chapter9 handler when class request is received from Host.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to XUsbPs instance of the controller.
is the setup data structure containing the setup request.

briefdescription.para: This file contains definitions used in the chapter 9 code.

para.preformatted:
Ver Who Date Changes
1.00a wgr 10/10/10 First release ms 04/10/17 Modified filename tag to include the file in doxygen examples.
